{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/ai-collaborations/ensembles/README.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

h1. Ансамбли проектов

_Файлов:_ 9

h2. Содержание

* [1-agentic-knowledge-os.md|1-agentic-knowledge-os.md] — 
* [2-distributed-agent-workshop.md|2-distributed-agent-workshop.md] — 
* [3-forensic-rag.md|3-forensic-rag.md] — 
* [4-web-to-knowledge-pipeline.md|4-web-to-knowledge-pipeline.md] — 
* [5-agent-firewall.md|5-agent-firewall.md] — > [!WARNING]
* [6-continuous-eval-loop.md|6-continuous-eval-loop.md] — 
* [7-domain-agent-app-factory.md|7-domain-agent-app-factory.md] — 
* [8-budget-aware-intelligence-stack.md|8-budget-aware-intelligence-stack.md] — 
* [9-ambient-team-agent.md|9-ambient-team-agent.md] — 



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [README|docs/svyazi-2-0/ensembles/README.md] (сходство 0.19)
* [README|docs/svyazi-2-0/components/README.md] (сходство 0.17)
* [README|docs/obsidian/03-technology-combinations/README.md] (сходство 0.14)
